arts.ttl: Tudor to stick with winning side: Predicted Juventus lineup vs. Man City
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Juventus could line up for Thursday’s FIFA Club World Cup Group G clash with Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Lewis blow, Rodri decision: Predicted Man City lineup vs. Juventus
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Manchester City could line up for Thursday’s FIFA Club World Cup Group G clash with Juventus.

arts.ttl: “Bitter” Juventus star has “something to prove” after failed Man City transfer
arts.sum: “Bitter” Juventus full-back Andrea Cambiaso will have “something to prove” in Thursday’s Club World Cup showdown with Man City following his failed transfer to the Etihad Stadium, Citizens expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole.
